title: Risk & Transaction Analytics
description: Detect fraud patterns, score credit risk, monitor portfolio performance, and track transaction volumes across accounts and customer segments.
longDescription: This demo deploys a financial services analytics environment on the medallion architecture. It ingests synthetic transaction records, account master data, and customer profiles. The pipeline produces fraud-flag rates, credit risk distributions, daily transaction volumes, and segment-level portfolio KPIs. A Direct Lake semantic model powers dashboards with real-time fraud alerts, risk heat-maps, and revenue contribution by customer segment.
prerequisites: Azure AD account with Fabric workspace creation permissions

sampleData.description: Financial transactions with account, amount, merchant category, timestamp, and fraud flag
Account master data — account type, balance, credit limit, open date, status
Customer profiles — age group, region, segment (Retail/SME/Corporate), risk tier

fabricItems.name: financial_lakehouse
fabricItems.description: Central lakehouse for all financial analytics data

fabricItems.name: 01_bronze_ingest
fabricItems.description: Ingest raw CSV files into Bronze Delta tables with metadata columns

fabricItems.name: 02_silver_transform
fabricItems.description: Clean transactions, validate accounts, derive fraud risk scores and credit utilisation

fabricItems.name: 03_gold_aggregate
fabricItems.description: 6 Gold tables: daily transaction summary, fraud analysis, credit risk distribution, segment portfolio, weekly trends, account scorecards

fabricItems.name: 04_reporting_views
fabricItems.description: SQL reporting views: executive dashboard, fraud hotspots, risk heat-map, segment performance

fabricItems.name: 05_dashboard
fabricItems.description: Interactive HTML dashboard with KPI cards, fraud trends, risk distribution, portfolio by segment

fabricItems.name: financial_analytics_model
fabricItems.description: Direct Lake semantic model with transactions, risk, and portfolio measures

fabricItems.name: Financial Services Dashboard
fabricItems.description: 3-page Power BI dashboard: Transaction Overview, Fraud & Risk, Portfolio & Segments

fabricItems.name: daily_financial_pipeline
fabricItems.description: Orchestrates Bronze → Silver → Gold notebook execution daily
